title: Community Readiness Checklist
name: Community Readiness Checklist
description: Post-creation review checklist for community hubs. Admin reviews welcome flow and first prompt before inviting members. Checks are spec-driven — add, remove, reorder, or tune without code changes.

story.iWant: to review the welcome flow and first conversation before inviting members
story.soThat: I'm confident the community experience is welcoming and aligned with our purpose

context.applies: After Quick Launch community creation, before the first member conversation
assumptions: Quick Launch has created domain, identity, playbook, and test caller
Communities have no content upload or curriculum — only onboarding and prompt
Critical checks gate 'Invite Members'. Recommended checks are advisory.
Action hrefs use ${variable} templates resolved at runtime from context

parameters.name: Community Readiness Checks
parameters.description: Ordered list of readiness checks for community hubs. Fewer than course readiness — communities have no content or curriculum.

checks.name: Configure Welcome
checks.description: Set the welcome message and flow for the member's first conversation

checks.name: Preview First Message
checks.description: Preview what the community guide will say in the first conversation

acceptanceCriteria.title: Critical checks gate Invite Members
acceptanceCriteria.given: A community with a failing critical check (e.g. no prompt composed)
acceptanceCriteria.when: The admin views the community readiness checklist
acceptanceCriteria.then: The 'Invite Members' button is disabled and the fix action is shown

acceptanceCriteria.title: Recommended checks are advisory
acceptanceCriteria.given: A community with all critical checks passing but some recommended failing
acceptanceCriteria.when: The admin views the community readiness checklist
acceptanceCriteria.then: The 'Invite Members' button is enabled, but warnings highlight unreviewed items

acceptanceCriteria.title: All checks pass shows fully ready
acceptanceCriteria.given: A community with all checks passing
acceptanceCriteria.when: The admin views the community readiness checklist
acceptanceCriteria.then: All items show green and 'Invite Members' is prominently available

constraints.description: Readiness check should complete in under 200ms (only 2 checks)

related.title: Quick Launch Orchestrator
related.relationship: Runs before this — creates the community to be reviewed

related.title: Course Readiness Checklist
related.relationship: Parallel readiness spec for institutional courses — more checks (content + curriculum)

related.title: Prompt Composition
related.relationship: Prompt composition check verifies COMP-001 has produced a prompt
